title: Senior Financial Analyst - NHB - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - NHB - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at NHB are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NHB:
NHB is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
